name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: A prime example of a healthy Deshi cow perfectly suited for Qurbani. This animal has been raised on a strict organic diet of green grass and oilseed cake, ensuring lean, high-quality meat. It features a calm temperament and a well-maintained coat, reflecting the care given by local Bogura farmers.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: This premium Jamunapari goat is distinguished by its long drooping ears and Roman nose. It is highly active, disease-free, and has been vaccinated regularly. Known for its impressive stature and weight gain, it is a top choice for those looking for a majestic small animal for sacrifice.

name: Brahman Cross
description: An imposing Brahman crossbreed with a significant muscle mass and a prominent hump. This bull is ideal for a grand Qurbani celebration. It has been raised in a spacious environment in Sirajganj, ensuring it is both physically strong and mentally settled. Fully vaccinated and dewormed.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: The Black Bengal is world-renowned for its superior meat quality and skin texture. Though compact in size, this particular goat is exceptionally energetic and healthy. It has been naturally grazed in the fields of Kushtia, resulting in meat that is tender and flavorful.

name: Red Chittagong Bull
description: A pure-breed Red Chittagong (RCC) bull, famous for its iconic reddish coat and high adaptability. This bull offers an excellent meat-to-bone ratio, making it a cost-effective yet premium choice. It has been meticulously cared for by experienced breeders to maintain its pure genetic line.

name: Dumba (Fat-tailed Sheep)
description: This exotic Turkish Dumba features the characteristic heavy fat-tail, which is highly sought after for traditional recipes. It has been successfully acclimatized to the local climate in a Dhaka-based farm and fed a high-protein diet to ensure optimal health and size for the festive season.

name: Sahiwal Bull
description: A massive Sahiwal bull that represents the peak of dairy and meat breeds. It boasts a beautiful brownish-red coat, a massive dewlap, and a sturdy build. Raised in the lush pastures of Pabna, this bull is exceptionally docile and has reached its prime weight for a high-end Qurbani.

name: White Beetal Goat
description: A tall and elegant White Beetal goat, often referred to as the 'poor man's cow' due to its size. This animal features long, pendulous ears and a spirited personality. It has been raised with great attention to hygiene and nutrition in Jessore, making it a healthy and visually striking choice.

name: Gir Bull Cross
description: This Gir-Holstein crossbreed combines the resilience of the Gir breed with the heavy weight of the Holstein. It features a unique spotted pattern and a broad frame. The bull is well-fed with a mix of silage and grains, ensuring a high fat content that is perfect for traditional slow-cooked beef dishes.

name: Barbari Goat
description: A charming, medium-sized Barbari goat with an alert stance and a unique brown-spotted white coat. Known for being very prolific and having lean, high-protein meat. It is a very active animal that has been kept in a clean, open-air farm in Mymensingh.

name: Sindhi Red Bull
description: A robust Red Sindhi bull featuring a deep mahogany coat. This breed is famous for its heat tolerance and hardy nature. This specific bull has been raised in Narsingdi on a specialized fattening program to ensure it meets the highest standards for the Qurbani market.

name: Totapuri Goat
description: The Totapuri goat is easily identified by its parrot-like facial profile. This is a heavy-weight goat, well-suited for those who prefer more meat than a standard Deshi goat. It has been raised in the northern climate of Rangpur and is in peak physical condition.
